{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323055059FE87DC52F365226ADD21\"}"},"total":303},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7261888455075791675","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔好！剧情赞！就是有点短，但也足够看。2.2万字，写尽一个婚内不幸的女人的挣扎，自立，纠结，回归，无奈。写实心痛！2023-7-30"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690790260,"group_id":"7229640714135538699","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"三观正的书评高分，讨厌恋爱脑。\n本人的爱情是小说照进现实！学渣妹妹与学霸哥哥的婚姻30年💞💞💞\n另外，闺女（程序媛）Emily不拍糖水片（抖/书同号），程序员的旅游视频，欢迎围观💖💖💖","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzVklLY9uMZTAs9fLHt18Bo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f6061387f54a4b879ae84f45ba92d6d6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788790\u0026x-signature=fOycZMRcBtqYz0erIqTHI5wUbnk%3D","user_id":"835279834330696","user_name":"马甲线不退休"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"835279834330696","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774484975,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229640714135538699","book_info":{"abstract":"方小苹要了二胎后变成了全职主妇，生活一地鸡毛：老大的争宠，公婆的旁观，丈夫的轻慢，家庭地位的下降让她日益崩溃，终于爆发离家出走。丈夫冷眼旁观，她无台阶可下，去深圳投奔小她十岁的堂妹璐璐，她找到了新的工作，遇到了得志但势利的旧日好友，被她甩掉现在事业有成的初恋情人，参与了堂妹的恋情，赢得老狐狸老魏的青睐，找到了自我，她决心和丈夫以及过去决裂，奔向新生，却抵不过儿女的眼泪，最后选择了妥协和苟且，但她亦非以前的她，有信心从新生活里砸吧出不同的滋味来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5c1dedf5671258b831d4311b4d16d1b6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"露西花 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7229640714135538699","book_name":"一个中年妇女的崩溃之路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"57.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":2,\"name\":\"都市生活\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=2\u0026name=都市生活\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588086770525277208","read_count":"1066","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"21716"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"5","tags":"精品小说,都市生活","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c1dedf5671258b831d4311b4d16d1b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779400259\u0026x-signature=5Tqn%2FPweAt1izi%2Fx0u97gMEWHSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"729681646331148","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.823239e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323055059FE87DC52F365226ADD21\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1823,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5497},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401065986025521982","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的真好，开放式的结局也特别棒[赞]这里没有坏人，每个人都被生活裹挟着，甚至是被动麻木的前行。一次打破惯性的举动，使得大家暂停下来重新审视相互之间的关系，或许会有所改变，也或许会回到老路上去。有人说憋屈，但我看到了满满的希望，我看到女主无论家庭会有怎样的变化，都有信心和能力去面对，而不会再像出走时那一刻畏畏缩缩，茫然失措。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723197346,"group_id":"7229640714135538699","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8WySZl6Wu6UV0r9+ZokHPA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776787248\u0026x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"102107375751","user_name":"九龙辇的木偶兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102107375751","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1703045168,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229640714135538699","book_info":{"abstract":"方小苹要了二胎后变成了全职主妇，生活一地鸡毛：老大的争宠，公婆的旁观，丈夫的轻慢，家庭地位的下降让她日益崩溃，终于爆发离家出走。丈夫冷眼旁观，她无台阶可下，去深圳投奔小她十岁的堂妹璐璐，她找到了新的工作，遇到了得志但势利的旧日好友，被她甩掉现在事业有成的初恋情人，参与了堂妹的恋情，赢得老狐狸老魏的青睐，找到了自我，她决心和丈夫以及过去决裂，奔向新生，却抵不过儿女的眼泪，最后选择了妥协和苟且，但她亦非以前的她，有信心从新生活里砸吧出不同的滋味来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5c1dedf5671258b831d4311b4d16d1b6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"露西花 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7229640714135538699","book_name":"一个中年妇女的崩溃之路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"57.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":2,\"name\":\"都市生活\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=2\u0026name=都市生活\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588086770525277208","read_count":"1066","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"21716"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"5","tags":"精品小说,都市生活","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c1dedf5671258b831d4311b4d16d1b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779400259\u0026x-signature=5Tqn%2FPweAt1izi%2Fx0u97gMEWHSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"729681646331148","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323055059FE87DC52F365226ADD21\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3686},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7291114925983646527","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事短小精干，是值得点赞的小故事。女主坚强、独立、有思想、有原则的女人。她最后选择了回归家庭也很正常，本来与她的丈夫也没有出轨和其他狗血的事情发生。选择了回归是最明智的选择，在我们这些过来人眼中，还是原配夫妻才能走到最后。什么离婚了又能找到良配的事只有小说里才能出现。女主的丈夫只是大男人主义严重了点，经过女主的离家出走也给了他教训，可能他也意识到了这点。最后他们会有一个好的人生的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697596989,"group_id":"7229640714135538699","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9bwQue/a/y18tJW+q1uIvHZEhjXvuj1uU/Tl+0Vh/4f","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/47affbb2db8343cc9bfbc65b10e0100c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776795894\u0026x-signature=H2FSb4ddeDIGHcs%2BMKf7cm29ero%3D","user_id":"4037008327189230","user_name":"丹青姐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4037008327189230","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229640714135538699","book_info":{"abstract":"方小苹要了二胎后变成了全职主妇，生活一地鸡毛：老大的争宠，公婆的旁观，丈夫的轻慢，家庭地位的下降让她日益崩溃，终于爆发离家出走。丈夫冷眼旁观，她无台阶可下，去深圳投奔小她十岁的堂妹璐璐，她找到了新的工作，遇到了得志但势利的旧日好友，被她甩掉现在事业有成的初恋情人，参与了堂妹的恋情，赢得老狐狸老魏的青睐，找到了自我，她决心和丈夫以及过去决裂，奔向新生，却抵不过儿女的眼泪，最后选择了妥协和苟且，但她亦非以前的她，有信心从新生活里砸吧出不同的滋味来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5c1dedf5671258b831d4311b4d16d1b6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"露西花
